response.global_analysis: Verified: Audio phonetically matches Song 2 ('BANDAGE') in the Reference JSON, though Song 1 ('Fly Me to the Moon') in the JSON uses a different set of Japanese lyrics than those sung. I have prioritized the on-screen text and audio for Song 1. Transcribed dialogue between songs using scene context. Discarded unused 'BANDAGE' lyrics from the JSON beyond the video segment's duration.

subtitles.original: 一番乗りで Fly me to the moon
subtitles.english: Being the first one there, Fly me to the moon

subtitles.original: 飛び込んできて Fly me to the moon
subtitles.english: Come diving in, Fly me to the moon

subtitles.original: あなただけに Fly me to the moon
subtitles.english: Only for you, Fly me to the moon

subtitles.original: うわー！すごーい！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Amazing!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ緊張したー！うまっ！
subtitles.english: I was so nervous! That was so good!

subtitles.original: かっこいい！すごい！
subtitles.english: So cool! Awesome!

subtitles.original: 音大丈夫だった？
subtitles.english: Was the sound okay?

subtitles.original: あ、もうちょっとあげる？
subtitles.english: Ah, should I turn it up a bit?

subtitles.original: もうちょっとあげたほうがいいかな？
subtitles.english: Maybe I should turn it up more?

subtitles.original: 声をもうすこしください。お願いします。
subtitles.english: A little more voice, please. Thank you.

subtitles.original: あー、緊張しない！
subtitles.english: Ah, don't be nervous!

subtitles.original: じゃ、次。次どうします？
subtitles.english: Okay, next. What should we do next?

subtitles.original: JTCちゃん、何がいいかな？
subtitles.english: JTC-chan, what would be good?
Then, let's go with 12. 12?

subtitles.original: じゃあ、12で。ピピっと。
subtitles.english: Okay, 12 it is. *Beep beep*

subtitles.original: 今から盛り上がってもいいんですか？マイク持って！
subtitles.english: Is it okay to get hyped now? Grab the mic!

subtitles.original: サイリウム持って！
subtitles.english: Grab your lightsticks!

subtitles.original: Sit up 姿勢正して
subtitles.english: Sit up, straighten your posture

subtitles.original: ひねくれた態度じゃ 不合格です
subtitles.english: With that twisted attitude, you're failing

subtitles.original: 不幸中の幸いは 飽きてしまうわ
subtitles.english: I'll get bored of the silver lining in this misfortune

subtitles.original: Get up 目を覚まして
subtitles.english: Get up, wake up

subtitles.original: いい加減な言いなりに 黙ってうなづいてちゃ
subtitles.english: Just nodding silently to careless obedience

subtitles.original: No, no, no 伸び代がないわ
subtitles.english: No, no, no, there's no room for growth

subtitles.original: I got 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 Things on my mind
subtitles.english: I got 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 things on my mind

subtitles.original: 思考 一向にまとまらない What do I do
subtitles.english: My thoughts won't come together at all, what do I do

subtitles.original: Running I'm running away 追いかける yesterday
subtitles.english: Running, I'm running away, chasing yesterday

subtitles.original: 決める覚悟 迷いは捨て
subtitles.english: Decide to decide, discard the hesitation

subtitles.original: 'Cause it's gonna hurt more The longer you wait
subtitles.english: 'Cause it's gonna hurt more the longer you wait

subtitles.original: 駆け引きなんていらない Say whatcha wanna say
subtitles.english: I don't need any mind games, say whatcha wanna say

subtitles.original: 憂鬱なマンデー 気分はブルー
subtitles.english: Melancholy Monday, feeling blue

subtitles.original: 痛みを噛んで 削ぎ剥がす
subtitles.english: Biting the pain, stripping it away

subtitles.original: 古びた BANDAGE いらない
subtitles.english: I don't need this old BANDAGE

subtitles.original: Do whatcha wanna do
subtitles.english: Do whatcha wanna do

subtitles.original: Man up 情けないね
subtitles.english: Man up, how pathetic

subtitles.original: 言い訳ばかり Conversation もう勘弁
subtitles.english: Nothing but excuses, this conversation, give me a break

subtitles.original: つまずくの恐れちゃ どこもいけないわ
subtitles.english: If you're afraid of stumbling, you can't go anywhere

subtitles.original: Stand up 世は罠だらけ
subtitles.english: Stand up, the world is full of traps

subtitles.original: 歯を見せれば 見せさせられる Nightmare?
subtitles.english: If you show your teeth, they'll make you show them, nightmare?

subtitles.original: 無感情になれるなら 教えて頂戴
subtitles.english: If I can become emotionless, please tell me how

subtitles.original: Tell me A B C D E F G 正解のライン
subtitles.english: Tell me A B C D E F G, the line of correctness

subtitles.original: 言葉選び出せない What do I do
subtitles.english: I can't choose the words, what do I do

subtitles.original: Finding I'm finding a way 追いかける One more day
subtitles.english: Finding, I'm finding a way, chasing one more day

subtitles.english: Decide to decide, discard the hesitation

subtitles.original: 'Cause it's gonna hurt more The longer you wait

subtitles.english: I don't need any mind games, say whatcha wanna say

subtitles.english: Biting the pain, stripping it away

subtitles.original: 古びた BANDAGE いらない
subtitles.english: I don't need this old BANDAGE

subtitles.original: Do whatcha wanna do
subtitles.english: Do whatcha wanna do

subtitles.original: また見て見ぬふりの繰り返し ズタボロな心を
subtitles.english: Repeating turning a blind eye again, my heart is in tatters

subtitles.original: 誰かのせいばかりしたって 何も変わりはしないの
subtitles.english: Even if I just keep blaming someone else, nothing will change

subtitles.original: 負った傷口も 瘡蓋に いつかは剥がれ落ちて
subtitles.english: The wounds I've suffered will scab over and one day peel away

subtitles.original: Sorry not so sorry 選んだ Story
subtitles.english: Sorry, not so sorry, the story I chose

subtitles.original: 自分次第でしょ
subtitles.english: It's up to me, right?

subtitles.original: 決める覚悟 迷いは捨て
subtitles.english: Decide to decide, discard the hesitation

subtitles.original: イェーイ！やったー！
